overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a nighttime walk through a neon-lit futuristic metropolis. The player emerges from a narrow alley beneath a holographic billboard, navigates a busy commercial street lined with towering advertisements, crosses a yellow-striped intersection, and continues past storefronts including the 'Kutsurogi Cafe'.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered alleyway beneath overpass with industrial HVAC systems

events.description: red delivery van passes from right to left in front of the camera
turns left and exits the alley onto the main neon-lit street

agents.ego_description: walking forward through a narrow concrete alley, passing large industrial HVAC units stacked along the left wall

notable_agents.action: red van driving past from right to left at the start of the segment
two individuals standing near the wall conversing beside the HVAC units

entered.detail: massive digital advertisement displaying a woman with purple hair holding a purple beverage can with '16 Flavors' text
stacked metallic air conditioning and ventilation units along the concrete wall
dark underpass entrance with vehicle headlights visible in the distance
illuminated signs and text on the building facade including 'INFINITAS' lettering

segments.scene_description: The segment begins in a dimly lit concrete alley beneath an overpass, dominated by a large holographic billboard advertising a beverage. A red van passes by at the start, and the camera walks forward past industrial HVAC units while two NPCs stand conversing near the wall. The segment ends as the camera turns left to exit onto a brightly lit main street.

scene_state.functional_zone: main commercial boulevard with towering holographic advertising displays

events.description: emerges from dimly lit alley into brightly illuminated neon street with holographic billboards

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk of a busy neon-lit street, observing the towering buildings covered in animated advertisements

notable_agents.action: multiple cars driving along the street including a yellow taxi and dark sedans

entered.detail: massive buildings completely covered in animated holographic advertisements and video screens displaying various products
tall palm trees lining the median and opposite side of the wide street
modern street lamps with distinctive red accent lighting along the sidewalk edge
distinctive red paved section of the walkway running parallel to the street

segments.scene_description: The camera emerges from the alley onto a wide commercial boulevard bathed in neon light. Towering buildings covered in massive holographic advertisements rise on both sides, while palm trees line the street and vehicles pass by on the road. The sidewalk features a distinctive red paved section as the camera walks forward through this futuristic urban canyon.

scene_state.functional_zone: pedestrian crosswalk at busy intersection with yellow safety stripes

events.description: approaches crosswalk and stops to wait for passing vehicles
begins crossing the street as traffic clears, green 'WALK' projection visible on the ground
completes crossing and steps onto the opposite sidewalk

agents.ego_description: waiting at the crosswalk for vehicles to pass, then walking across the yellow-striped intersection to the opposite side

notable_agents.action: silver sedan driving through the intersection from left to right
dark colored car passing by on the street

entered.detail: wide pedestrian crossing with bold diagonal yellow stripes and green 'WALK' text projection
open intersection area where multiple streets meet with traffic control signals
tall pole with traffic lights and pedestrian crossing signals

segments.scene_description: The camera approaches a wide intersection with a yellow-striped crosswalk. After waiting for a silver sedan to pass, the player crosses the street while green 'WALK' text is projected on the asphalt. The segment ends upon reaching the opposite sidewalk, with the massive holographic towers now visible to the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial sidewalk with cafes and retail storefronts

events.description: arrives on the opposite sidewalk and continues walking past storefronts

agents.ego_description: continuing down the sidewalk past various commercial establishments, following a pedestrian in pink clothing

notable_agents.action: woman in a pink outfit walking ahead on the sidewalk in the same direction
person standing outside the Kutsurogi Cafe entrance near the neon open sign

entered.detail: storefront with illuminated yellow signage reading 'KUTSUROGI CAFE' above the entrance
green circular neon sign with 'OPEN' text glowing above the cafe doorway
orange safety barriers with reflective stripes separating the sidewalk from the street
metal roll-down shutters on closed shops with graffiti and corporate logos

segments.scene_description: Having crossed the intersection, the camera walks along the opposite sidewalk past the 'Kutsurogi Cafe' with its green neon 'OPEN' sign. Orange safety barriers line the street edge while pedestrians walk ahead and stand near shop entrances. The segment continues past various storefronts with metal shutters as the towering holographic advertisements remain visible further down the street.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a dim, industrial alleyway into the vibrant, neon-drenched heart of a futuristic metropolis. It begins beneath an overpass in a concrete alley dominated by a beverage hologram, moving past HVAC units and conversing NPCs as a red van passes by. As the camera turns left, the scene opens from the shadows into a wide commercial boulevard where towering holographic advertisements and palm trees line a red-paved sidewalk. The movement continues toward a wide intersection, pausing for a silver sedan before crossing a yellow-striped crosswalk illuminated by projected green walk signs. Finally, the camera proceeds along the opposite sidewalk past the green neon sign of the Kutsurogi Cafe and orange safety barriers, moving through a corridor of storefronts under the glow of the distant holographic towers.
